task_completion.description: Verify the Electrical Engineering Calculations app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main menu or home screen of the 'Electrical Calculations' app.

task_completion.description: Verify the tool for calculating neutral current in an unbalanced three-phase system is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screen or section titled 'Neutral current', 'Unbalanced three-phase', or similar within the app.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct phase currents are entered into the app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for input fields corresponding to L1, L2, and L3 containing the exact values 145, 130, and 160 respectively.

task_completion.description: Verify the app successfully calculates and displays the neutral current.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the result section on the screen displaying the calculated neutral current, which should be approximately 25.98 (or 25.98A).

task_completion.description: Verify a screenshot of the result is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot animation, a notification thumbnail, or a terminal command executing a screencap to '/sdcard/neutral_result.png'.

task_completion.description: Verify the numerical result is recorded in the specified text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal command (like echo) writing the value '25.98' to '/sdcard/neutral_current.txt'.

integrity.description: Ensure the calculation was performed in the actual Electrical Calculations app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the UI matches a genuine Android application for electrical calculations, rather than a web browser or a generic calculator.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just write the expected answer to the text file without calculating it.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify there is a sequence showing the inputs being entered into the app and the result being generated before the text file is created.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshot taken is of the actual app interface showing the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the screen being captured actually contains the Electrical Calculations app with the inputs and the 25.98A result visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected neutral current for an unbalanced three-phase system with L1=145A, L2=130A, L3=160A is exactly 25.98A. The correct app to use is 'Electrical Calculations' (package: com.hsn.electricalcalculations). The agent must save the visual result to '/sdcard/neutral_result.png' and the text result to '/sdcard/neutral_current.txt'.
